name: Hardrock Maple Melamine
notes: Standard ACC carcass for melamine-fronted jobs. Drawing label: HARDROCK MAPLE MEL. Must be called out with supplier code — ambiguous "Plywood Box" language caused $70k error on Spivey job.

name: Prefinished Maple Plywood
notes: Premium plywood box — used when paint/stain doors are upgraded. Drawing label: PF Maple Ply or PREFIN. MAPLE PLYWOOD. Must specify SKU — see CAR-001 incident note.

name: Prefinished Maple Plywood — Mel Ply Variant
notes: Melamine-coated plywood box. Drawing label: Maple Mel Ply (Spivey). Same substrate as CAR-002 but melamine face instead of raw prefinish. Confirm SKU with purchasing.

name: Prefinished Birch Plywood
notes: Cheaper plywood alt — use when maple ply is unavailable or over budget

name: White Particleboard
notes: Rare — only when customer specifically asks

name: Other (specify in notes)
notes: Escape hatch — PM must enter material in the per-finish notes field
